channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19914] sanity test_124g: FAIL: enable 6457 > disable 6399
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d7e7476c-88fe-4429-962d-d92012420a3e

test_124g failed with the following error:

CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.exports.10.240.31.208@tcp.ldlm_stats=
snapshot_time             1771802281.749963379 secs.nsecs
start_time                1771797591.728780774 secs.nsecs
elapsed_time              4690.021182605 secs.nsecs
ldlm_enqueue              1201112 samples [reqs]
ldlm_convert              10 samples [reqs]
ldlm_cancel               247208 samples [reqs]
ldlm_bl_callback          160238 samples [reqs]
ldlm_cp_callback          2 samples [reqs]
start stat & ls ops...
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round0 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1201736
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round1 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1202374
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round2 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1202989
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round3 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1203632
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round4 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1204278
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round5 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1204938
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round6 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1205585
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round7 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1206227
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round8 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1206872
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
round9 done, priv_cnt=1, temp_enq=1207511
CMD: onyx-155vm207 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdt.*-MDT0000.exports.'10.240.31.208@tcp'.ldlm_stats
base_dir=/mnt/lustre/d124g.sanity/LRU, priv=
o_enq=1201112, n_enq=1207511, ref_enq_res=6399
>> lfru_enable=6457, disable=6399
 sanity test_124g: @@@@@@ FAIL: enable 6457 > disable 6399

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4704 - 6.12.0-55.43.1.el10_0.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4704 - 6.12.0-55.43.1_lustre.el10.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_124g - enable 6457 > disable 6399

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: This failed 41 times in the past 4 weeks on master branch, and is affecting patch testing.
